title: CherryST Modpack
description: Performance and stability for your vanilla minecraft client
body:
**WHAT IS IT?**

It is a mod package designed to improve the stability and performance of Minecraft (**especially for low-resource PCs**) without losing the vanilla essence. Mainly made for the users of my minecraft server. [Discord](https://discord.cherryst.net/)

**CHARACTERISTICS**

- Custom menu with quick server login
- Management of entities in large quantities
- Use only 1 thread to generate chunks to eliminate stuttering
- Supports customizable entities, blocks, and models
- Compatible with custom sky
- Compatible with Shaders
- Compatible with custom capes (Minecraft, Optifine, LabyMod, cosmetica, MinecraftCapes, Cloaks+, Wynntils)
- Reduces RAM usage (**Can work using only 2GB ram**)
- And much more


**Vanilla**
![Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c26609c79f5ff964f1f515ae4de3ec943fef0cd.png) 

**Modpack**
![Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81e05384cde6ba76182cf9d3e0f260e312a0590.png)



**NOTE:** This modpack has been tested on an **i5-6500 3.2GHz** processor without a graphics card, this means that performance may vary depending on system specifications.
